lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਰਜੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਕਦਮ ਸਲਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: acharaj teree kudarat tere kadam salaah |
lines.english: Your Creative Power is marvellous, and Your Lotus Feet are admirable.
Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the whole world is just ashes. ||1||
Your Praise is priceless, O True King. ||2||
Meditate day and night on the Cherisher of the meek and humble. ||3||
God is the Support of the unsupported.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਹੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਦਿਲ ਜੀਅ ਪਰਾਨ ॥੪॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: alahu na visarai dil jeea paraan |4|10|
lines.english: May I never forget God; He is my heart, my soul, my breath of life. ||4||10||
God has been merciful to Nanak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਸਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਹਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh kaa bhaanaa sat kar sahahu |1|
lines.english: Accept the Will of God as True. ||1||
As Gurmukh, obtain the true wealth.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Live, live, live forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਕਹਹੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har har har rasanaa kahahu |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With your tongue, chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||
Rise early each day, and drink in the Nectar of the Lord.
In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the One Name alone shall save you.
Serving the True Guru, all fruits and rewards are obtained.
Nanak speaks the wisdom of God. ||2||11||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The filth of so many lifetimes is washed away. ||1||
Your Name, God, is the Purifier of sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਕਰਮ ਲਿਖੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poorab karam likhe gun gaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Because of the karma of my past deeds, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I am saved.
Serving at God's Feet, all comforts are obtained.
I am blessed with honor in God's Court. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੂਰਿ ਬਾਛਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਦੇਵਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhoor baachheh sabh sur nar devaa |3|
lines.english: All the angels and demi-gods long for the dust of the feet of such beings. ||3||
Nanak has obtained the treasure of the Naam.
God hugs His slave close in His Embrace.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਉਧਰਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਜਹਾਨੁ ॥੪॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: har jap jap udhariaa sagal jahaan |4|12|
lines.english: Chanting and meditating on the Lord, the whole world is saved. ||4||12||
The Lord saves His servants from the sinners.
He throws the slanderer into the fire. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪੀ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਕਤਹੂ ਨਾਹੀ ਪਾਪੀ ਪਚਿਆ ਆਪ ਕਮਾਇਣ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paapee kee gat katahoo naahee paapee pachiaa aap kamaaein |1| rahaau |
lines.english: No one can save the sinner. The sinner is destroyed by his own actions. ||1||Pause||
The Lord's slave is in love with the Dear Lord.
The slanderer loves something else. ||2||
God does not come or go; He is All-pervading and permeating.
The Supreme Lord God has revealed His Innate Nature.
The evil-doer obtains the fruits of his own actions. ||3||
Slave Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord. ||4||13||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Bhairao, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀਧਰ ਮੋਹਨ ਸਗਲ ਉਪਾਵਨ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sreedhar mohan sagal upaavan nirankaar sukhadaataa |
lines.english: The Fascinating Lord, the Creator of all, the Formless Lord, is the Giver of Peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਨ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਵਨ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਰਸ ਮਾਤਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aisaa prabh chhodd kareh an sevaa kavan bikhiaa ras maataa |1|
lines.english: You have abandoned this Lord, and you serve another. Why are you intoxicated with the pleasures of corruption? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਉਪਾਵ ਸਗਲ ਮੈ ਦੇਖੇ ਜੋ ਚਿਤਵੀਐ ਤਿਤੁ ਬਿਗਰਸਿ ਕਾਜੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avar upaav sagal mai dekhe jo chitaveeai tith bigaras kaaj |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have seen all other sorts of efforts; whatever you can think of, will only bring failure. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਗੋਵਿਦ ਭਾਜੁ ॥
lines.translit: re man mere too govid bhaaj |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਨਿੰਦਹਿ ਨਿਗੁਰੇ ਪਸੂ ਸਮਾਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har kee bhagat kareh tin nindeh nigure pasoo samaanaa |2|
lines.english: They slander those who worship their Lord; they are like beasts, without a Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਦਾਸੀ ਕਉ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧ ਅਗਿਆਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur chhodd daasee kau simareh manamukh andh agiaanaa |
lines.english: The blind, ignorant, self-willed manmukhs forsake their Lord and Master, and dwell on His slave Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਸਾਕਤ ਕਹਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd tan dhan sabh prabh kaa saakat kahate meraa |
lines.english: Soul, life, body and wealth all belong to God, but the faithless cynics claim that they own them.
